## What changed

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Data addition (MCP server, skill, category, etc.)
- [ ] Data correction
- [ ] Pipeline improvement
- [ ] View enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the schema in `ontology/schema.yaml`
- [ ] Required YAML fields are present
- [ ] I ran `make build` and it succeeded
- [ ] I previewed changes locally with `make serve`
- [ ] My changes generate no new errors

## Screenshots (if applicable)

For view changes, include before/after screenshots.
